headline: Is It Time To Reassess Costco Wholesale (COST) After Its Recent Pullback?
summary: Wondering if Costco Wholesale at around US$980.85 is still a fair deal or if the value case is fading? This breakdown will help you put the current price in context. The stock recently saw a 3.2% decline over the past week and a 2.7% decline over the past month, even though it is up 14.8% year to date and 1.0% over the last year, with a 105.6% return over three years and 178.7% over five years. Recent headlines have continued to focus on Costco Wholesale's role as a major membership based...
